tasks.label: uv sync
tasks.command: uv sync --group dev --group test --group lint --group typing

tasks.label: test
tasks.command: uv run pytest; status=$?; if [ "$status" -eq 5 ]; then echo 'No tests collected yet.'; exit 0; fi; exit "$status"

tasks.label: format
tasks.command: uv run black . && uv run ruff check . --fix

tasks.label: typecheck
tasks.command: uv run python -c "from pathlib import Path; raise SystemExit(0 if any(p.suffix == '.py' and '.venv' not in p.parts for p in Path('.').rglob('*')) else 1)"; has_py=$?; if [ "$has_py" -eq 0 ]; then uv run mypy .; else echo 'No Python files to typecheck yet.'; fi
